vocab.meaning: hoạt động thể chất cường độ mạnh
vocab.example: I try to engage in at least thirty minutes of vigorous physical activity daily to keep my metabolic rate high.

vocab.meaning: giấc ngủ phục hồi sức khỏe
vocab.example: Consistency is key, so I prioritize getting seven hours of restorative sleep to allow my muscles to recover.

vocab.meaning: chất xơ trong chế độ ăn uống
vocab.example: Incorporating ample dietary fiber through whole grains and legumes is essential for maintaining digestive health.
A balanced intake of vitamins and minerals is my primary strategy to stave off seasonal illnesses.

vocab.meaning: ăn uống trong tỉnh thức (chú ý đến cảm giác no/đói)
vocab.example: By practicing mindful eating, I’ve become much more attuned to my body's actual hunger signals rather than eating out of boredom.

vocab.meaning: sức khỏe/trạng thái tốt về mặt sinh lý
vocab.example: Regular check-ups are a non-negotiable part of my routine to monitor my general physiological well-being.

vocab.meaning: kiềm chế sự thèm muốn (đồ ăn không tốt)
vocab.example: It can be difficult to curb the urge to snack on processed sugars, so I replace them with organic fruits.
Yoga has been instrumental in improving my core strength, which in turn has corrected my posture issues.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái cung cấp nước tối ưu cho cơ thể
vocab.example: Maintaining optimal hydration is often overlooked, but it’s vital for cognitive function and skin health.

vocab.meaning: làm trẻ hóa/vực dậy tinh thần
vocab.example: I find that weekend retreats into nature effectively rejuvenate the mind and alleviate accumulated stress.
